# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment for our Node.js microservice. Focus on getting it deployed quickly - we'll optimize resource allocation later based on actual usage metrics. The service handles API requests and connects to a MongoDB database.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: hello-node-mongo
  labels:
    app: hello-node-mongo
spec:
  replicas: 3 # Pods per deployment
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: hello-node-mongo
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: hello-node-mongo
        tier: middle
    spec: 
      containers:
      - name: hello-node-mongo
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        image: alexellis2/k8s-hello-world-mongo:1.0.3 # DockerHub account alexellis2/k8s-hello-world-mongo:1.0.3
        ports:
          - containerPort: 4000
<!|end_of_code|>
